name: dory
description: Dory AI-native SQL workspace for agents.

interface.longDescription: Use Dory as an AI-native SQL workspace for database inspection, schema exploration, read-only SQL, Agent Runs, workspace tabs, saved queries, and result preservation. The plugin provides workflow guidance only; live database access requires Dory MCP setup.
defaultPrompt: Use Dory to inspect this database safely.
Save SQL analysis in a Dory workspace.
